description: Sector overlay for agricultural producers, exporters, processors, aggregators, and related agribusiness documentation in South Africa.

metadata.scope: South Africa-only sector overlay controls for Agriculture. Intended to be used with south_africa_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official South African legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Agricultural Product Standards Act 119 of 1990
used_for: sale and export of agricultural products

primary_sources.name: Plant Health (Phytosanitary) Act 35 of 2024
used_for: movement of plants and plant products

primary_sources.name: DALRRD mandate and key agriculture legislation
primary_sources.issuer: Department of Agriculture, Land Reform and Rural Development

primary_sources.name: Occupational Health and Safety Act, 1993
primary_sources.issuer: Republic of South Africa / Department of Employment and Labour

rules.title: Agricultural product standard, grading, or export-control evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for agricultural product standards, grading, classification, export-control, inspection, or certificate evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Phytosanitary or plant-health control evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for phytosanitary certificates, pest-control declarations, plant-health permits, or regulated-pest controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Agricultural resource conservation or environmental control evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for soil, water, vegetation, conservation, environmental management, or waste-control language.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Conservation of Agricultural Resources Act / DALRRD framework

rules.title: Farm, processing, or operational health-and-safety evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for occupational health and safety, machinery, worker safety, pesticide handling, or safe operations evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Traceability, lot, batch, or supply-chain record evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for traceability, batch/lot records, producer registration, supplier records, or chain-of-custody evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified South African legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, current-law accuracy, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
